etymology.description: 早(早) (zǎo, "early") + 白(白) (bái, "white") = acorn-shaped fruit pod -> initial phonetic usage retaining original sense "acorn"
etymology.interpretation: The character 皁 uses the structure of 早(早) (zǎo, "early") combined with 白(白) (bái, "white") to represent an acorn, initially serving as a descriptor relating to the shape or appearance, and later maintained its meaning over time.
